title: Install, Scope, Package, and Govern Skills · Threat Case: Skill Locations
summary: Move a proven local skill into a team-distributed package. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext skill locations increment in a distributable skill plugin. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose repository, user, admin, or system scope according to ownership and audience.
Use missed triggers, repeated corrections, and failures to improve the skill.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
